hero.name: Truong Minh Hoang
hero.role: Student at Hanoi University of Science and Technology | AI Engineer Intern
hero.description: Passionate about researching and developing Artificial Intelligence systems, focusing on Computer Vision and Machine Learning.

about.title: About Me
about.headline: Developing intelligent Artificial Intelligence systems.
about.paragraph1: As a senior student majoring in Mathematics and Computer Science at Hanoi University of Science and Technology, I aim to build my career in Artificial Intelligence with a strong focus on Computer Vision and Generative AI.
about.paragraph2: I have experience in researching and deploying AI solutions such as Image Classification, Object Detection, Multi-Object Tracking, Re-Identification (ReID), and chatbots using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Furthermore, I am capable of building Backend and Web Applications to integrate, deploy, and operate AI systems in practical environments.
about.paragraph3: My goal is to become an AI Engineer, contributing to the development of AI products capable of solving real-world problems and bringing value to users.

cv.title: Computer Vision
cv.desc: Image classification, object detection, multi-object tracking, and Re-Identification using YOLOv8, ByteTrack, OpenCV.

dl.title: Deep Learning
dl.desc: Building, training, and optimizing Deep Learning models with PyTorch, CNN, and Transfer Learning.

backend.title: Backend & Deployment
backend.desc: Developing APIs, Backend, and integrating AI models using Node.js, Spring Boot, FastAPI.

rag.title: RAG & LLM
rag.desc: Building AI chatbots using RAG, Vector Database, LangChain, and LLMs.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of my prominent projects ranging from deep computer vision to smart chatbots and full-stack web applications.

reid.title: Football Player Re-Identification System
reid.desc: Built a Detection → Tracking → ReID pipeline to track and maintain player identities. Used YOLOv8 for detection, BoT-SORT for tracking, and ReID models to reduce ID Switch during occlusions.

food.title: Ingredient Recognition System from Images
food.desc: A system recognizing 65 food ingredients achieving mAP@50 > 80% (inference speed < 100ms) for automated recipe suggestions, integrated into the CookSmart application.

chatbot.title: AI Cooking Assistant Chatbot using RAG
chatbot.desc: An AI chatbot assisting in recipe search, ingredient consultation, and cooking instructions. Integrated RAG pipeline (Intent Detection, Retrieval, Response Gen) to reduce hallucination.

cooksmart.title: CookSmart – Recipe Suggestion Website
cooksmart.desc: A full-stack web application suggesting recipes based on ingredients. Provided API documentation via Swagger, implemented rate limiting, JWT security, and realtime features via Socket.IO.
